name: Weather Lookup
description: Domain-specific utility for forecast lookup, temperature, rain probability, and umbrella advice for a city and time.

name: Travel Booking
description: Domain-specific utility for flights, trains, hotels, destinations, and ticket booking for a planned trip.

name: Calculator
description: Numeric utility for arithmetic, percentages, tips, and unit conversion.

name: Personal Operations Copilot
description: A comprehensive tool that assists with writing and summarization, weather-aware planning with rain and umbrella guidance, hotel and ticket coordination, stock and bitcoin updates, alarm and meeting changes, and quick calculations such as percent and tip comparisons for everyday decisions.

name: Market Data
description: Finance utility for stock prices, crypto prices, market performance, and closing values.

name: Calendar Scheduler
description: Scheduling utility for alarms, meetings, appointment changes, and calendar events.
